top_signals.title: Exxon Sees $3.7 Billion Profit Surge From War-Driven Oil Rally
top_signals.summary: ExxonMobil Holdings Corp. said second-quarter earnings jumped by almost $4 billion as the Iran conflict boosted oil prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US strikes Iran in response to attacks on tankers
top_signals.summary: Move comes after US Treasury revoked a general licence allowing sales of Islamic republic’s oil in escalation of tensions

top_signals.title: Traders on Kalshi think the Nasdaq-100 will end 2026 above 30,000, predicting a cooler second half of the year
top_signals.summary: Speculators think the massive rally in the Nasdaq-100 since the lows following the U.S.-Iran war will be more subdued in the second half of 2026.

top_signals.title: Financial Policy Committee Record – July 2026
top_signals.summary: Our Financial Policy Committee (FPC) meets to identify risks to financial stability and agree policy actions aimed at safeguarding the resilience of the UK financial system.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US Army tests autonomous mass mine-laying
top_signals.summary: The Army’s Volcano mine dispenser can blanket 32 acres of terrain with up to 960 mines. Now, the Army is testing an autonomous version.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ‘Nigel can fix it’ — what Clacton voters think of Farage’s gambit
top_signals.summary: Many people in the seaside town, whether supporters of the rightwing populist or not, are pleased with move by Reform UK leader
